overview: Wellbrooke Care offers personalized weight loss treatment using GLP-1 and other medications, along with hormone replacement therapy for men and women. Care is delivered through both in-person appointments in Plainfield, Illinois and virtual telehealth visits.
highlights: In-person clinic in Plainfield, Illinois and virtual telehealth
Multiple GLP-1 and oral weight loss medication options
targetAudience: Illinois residents seeking personalized weight loss treatment, testosterone replacement therapy, or bioidentical hormone replacement therapy.
